apply DifferentiableAt.pow
  exact differentiableAt_id
  all_goals norm_num

/- Differentiability of x ↦ x ^ 3 -/

/- Show that `x ↦ x ^ 3` is differentiable.
-/
theorem DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x ↦ x ^ 3) : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x ↦ x ^ 3) := by
  apply DifferentiableAt.pow
  exact differentiableAt_id
  all_goals norm_num

/- Differentiability of x ↦ x ^ 3 -/
